chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI High Court Appeal No.112 of 2019 Dated Order with signature of Judge Hearing (priority) Case 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Main Case 3. For hearing of CMA No. 605/2019 Dated 17.01.2024 None present for the Appellant Ms. Farzana Yasmeen Advocate for the Respondent No.2 Barrister Sandeep Malani, A.A.G..-.-.-.-.-. Although it is stated by the learned counsel for the Respondent No.2 that this appeal has become infructuous as the suit properties have been sold out after filing of the appeal. Be that as it may, the Appellants’ counsel is not appearing since last few dates. He was called absent on 22.04.2021 and 31.10.2022 and so also today there is no intimation either. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
